title: Counting Treasure Cups
description: A pirate treasure counting game where kids tap exactly the asked number of gems or coins into a cup or chest.
learningGoals: Connect the last counted item with the total amount
interactionModel: tap-count collect rounds with emoji treasure cards flying into a cup or chest
feedbackModel: Each tap speaks the count with pop and whoosh SFX; round success gets sparkle SFX, a spoken total, and automatic progression.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
